subcodes.first_line: O Persian friend! According to what hath been heard, thou hast conferred a new distinction upon the newcomers and altered the prevailing customs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار پارسی از قرار مسموع نورسیدگانرا طرازی جدید دادی و رسوم و عادات جاریه
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @education of children; moral education
